# 4 kids; full check-in circle
roster: kid1=Maya, kid2=Leo, kid3=Aisha, kid4=Sam
@0 start
# warm-up phase (popcorn, timer-advanced @ 90s)
+5  kid2: I felt excited when I scored a goal!
+8  kid1: me too, at my birthday
+12 kid3: excited about the field trip
# let the warm-up timer run out, then go_around begins
+70 kid1: I feel happy today
+20 kid2: kind of tired
+18 kid3: pass
+15 kid4: I dunno... bored I guess
# reflect phase is open + timer-advanced @ 60s
+10 kid4: actually Maya's was nice
+70 >> end
